006package com.stuypulse.robot.commands.swerve.driveAligned;
007
008import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Field;
009
010public class SwerveDriveAlignToHub extends SwerveDriveSetAlignment {
011
012    public SwerveDriveAlignToHub() {
013        super(Field::getHubPose);
014    }
015}
